sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Textron Inc. stock (US8832031027): Is aviation strength now the key to beating industrials peers?
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (US8832031027) is positioned for steady growth in the industrials sector due to its strong aviation and defense segments, which provide a buffer against economic downturns and benefit from rising U.S. military spending. The company's diversified model, emphasizing high-margin aftermarket services and critical markets like military helicopters and business jets, offers reliable returns for investors globally. However, risks such as supply chain bottlenecks, commercial aviation softness, and competition from major players like Boeing and Lockheed remain factors to monitor.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) Price Target Raised to $250.00
feed.summary: Benchmark has increased its price target for J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) from $230.00 to $250.00, reiterating a "buy" rating on the stock. This projection suggests a potential upside of 4.90% from the company's current price. The article also details other analyst ratings, insider transactions, institutional trading activity, and recent financial performance of J.B. Hunt.

feed.title: Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) Rating Lowered to Equal Weight at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays analysts downgraded Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) from an "overweight" to an "equal weight" rating, lowering their price target to $49.00 from $50.00. This follows several other analyst adjustments, with the consensus rating for Exelon now "Hold" and a consensus target price of $51.00. The utility company recently reported earnings that topped consensus estimates and provided FY 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) Short Interest Down 15.5% in March
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) experienced a 15.5% decrease in short interest during March, falling to 806,849 shares. Despite recent price target reductions from some analysts, the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and reported strong quarterly earnings, significantly beating EPS and revenue estimates. Insiders, including the CEO, also conducted significant stock sales.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Webcasts 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call May 1, 2026 – 8:30 a.m. ET
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company will host a live webcast of its 2026 first quarter earnings conference call on May 1, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will feature key executives including Chairman, President and CEO, Noel Wallace, and will be accessible on Colgate’s investor relations website, with a recorded version available for later viewing. The company, known for various global brands in oral, personal, home, and pet care, also detailed its commitment to sustainability and community well-being.

feed.title: Welch Group LLC Has $2.11 Million Stock Holdings in General Mills, Inc. $GIS
feed.summary: Welch Group LLC significantly reduced its stake in General Mills (NYSE:GIS) by 94.5% in the fourth quarter, retaining shares valued at $2.11 million. This reduction comes as analysts have lowered price targets and ratings on General Mills due to missed earnings expectations, with the stock currently trading near $35 and offering a 6.9% dividend yield. Other institutional investors showed mixed activity, with some increasing and others decreasing their positions in the company.

feed.title: Welch Group LLC Sells 11,799 Shares of Aflac Incorporated $AFL
feed.summary: Welch Group LLC reduced its stake in Aflac Incorporated by 18.0% during the fourth quarter, selling 11,799 shares and retaining 53,635 shares valued at $5.914 million. Aflac missed quarterly earnings estimates, reporting $1.57 EPS against a $1.69 consensus, with revenues down 9.6% year-over-year. Insider selling of Aflac stock has been significant, totaling 572,632 shares worth approximately $63.5 million in the last three months, though institutional investors hold a substantial 67.44% of the stock.

feed.title: BofA raises Western Digital stock price target on margin outlook
feed.summary: BofA Securities has increased its price target for Western Digital Corp. (NASDAQ:WDC) to $415 from $375, maintaining a Buy rating, citing an optimistic outlook on the company's gross margin expansion. The firm's analysis projects Western Digital's third-quarter fiscal 2026 revenue, margins, and EPS to surpass guidance, especially noting incremental gross margins above 70%. The upgrade also considers the secular growth in the hard disk drive market and strong enterprise demand, despite InvestingPro's suggestion that the stock may be overvalued based on its Fair Value assessment.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Occidental Petroleum to $62 From $67, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has adjusted its price target for Occidental Petroleum (OXY) from $67 to $62, while maintaining a neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised outlook from the financial institution on the oil and gas exploration and production company. The article also provides recent trading information for Occidental Petroleum.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Colgate-Palmolive Price Target to $95 From $97, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has changed its price target for Colgate-Palmolive (CL) to $95, down from the previous $97, but still maintains an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a minor revision in the bank's valuation of the consumer goods giant. Other analysts have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for Colgate-Palmolive, indicating ongoing scrutiny of the company's financial outlook.

feed.title: Tax withholding trims EVP stake at Brandywine Realty (NYSE: BDN)
feed.summary: Brandywine Realty Trust EVP H. Jeffrey DeVuono reported a routine tax-related share disposition where 24,632 Common Shares of Beneficial Interest were withheld at $2.76 per share to cover payroll taxes on equity awards. This non-market transaction leaves him with 770,998 shares directly held. The Form 4 filing details that this was a tax-withholding disposition, not an open-market sale, and indicates the shares' value for tax purposes.

feed.title: Here's What We Like About Caterpillar's (NYSE:CAT) Upcoming Dividend
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is set to go ex-dividend in two days, with a payment of US$1.51 per share, totaling US$6.04 for the last year, representing a 0.8% trailing yield. The company's dividend appears sustainable, with a modest payout ratio of 31% of profit and 37% of free cash flow. Furthermore, Caterpillar has a strong earnings growth of 28% per annum over the past five years and a historical dividend growth rate of 7.0% per year, indicating a healthy outlook for its dividend payments.

feed.title: Is Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Pricing Look Reasonable After Recent Cybersecurity Headlines And Share Pullback
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock closed at US$166.97, after a recent pullback. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is approximately 8.9% undervalued at US$183.32 per share, while its P/E ratio of 105.63x is significantly higher than the industry average, indicating it might be overvalued based on earnings multiples. The article also presents "Bull" and "Bear" case narratives for the company, with fair values ranging from US$156.71 to US$205.96, highlighting different perspectives on its future growth and risks.

feed.title: Brandywine Realty Trust (BDN) CEO reports tax-withheld shares and ESPP buys
feed.summary: Brandywine Realty Trust President and CEO, Gerard H. Sweeney, reported a tax-withholding disposition of 5,988 common shares at $2.76 per share to cover payroll taxes for equity awards. After this transaction, Sweeney directly holds 4,169,899 common shares, which notably includes 4,826.25 additional shares acquired through the company's Employee Share Purchase Plan (ESPP) on April 10, 2026, at $2.59 per share. The report clarifies that this activity is a tax-withholding event rather than an open-market sale, maintaining a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Scotiabank Flags CAD $85 Million Adjusted Q2 Boost From KeyCorp Stake
feed.summary: Scotiabank anticipates a CAD $85 million adjusted boost to its Q2 2026 earnings from its stake in U.S. regional lender KeyCorp. This reflects a CAD $77 million net income contribution from KeyCorp's Q1 performance, after a one-month reporting lag, and excludes approximately CAD $8 million in intangible amortization. Scotiabank, operating as Bank of Nova Scotia (TSE:BNS), expects to release its Q2 results on May 27, 2026.

feed.title: Gilead extends Arcellx tender offer again (GILD:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has once again extended its tender offer to acquire all outstanding shares of Arcellx. As of April 16, nearly 18% of Arcellx's outstanding shares have been tendered. This marks another extension in Gilead's efforts to complete the acquisition.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. Acquires 8,090 Shares of Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. increased its stake in Philip Morris International Inc. by 2.2% in Q4, acquiring an additional 8,090 shares to bring its total holdings to 380,288 shares valued at $59.0 million. This comes despite significant insider sales from CFO Emmanuel Babeau and CEO Jacek Olczak. The company maintains an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $195.72, and offers a quarterly dividend of $1.47.

feed.title: Amcor Debuts Apex Jars and Flava Closure
feed.summary: Amcor has introduced significant packaging innovations, including Apex PET jars with Elevate technology for enhanced hot-fill capabilities and reduced shipping costs, and a lightweight Flava Flip Top Closure for various sauces. Additionally, the company is investing millions of euros in a new printing line in the Netherlands to boost its industrial film capabilities across Europe. These advancements aim to improve sustainability, efficiency, and performance in packaging.

feed.title: Qualcomm declares $0.92 quarterly dividend per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.92 per common share, representing an annual dividend yield of 2.65%. The company has a strong record of increasing its dividend for 23 consecutive years. Despite recent analyst downgrades due to competition and smartphone market challenges, Qualcomm is pursuing diversification strategies, including a partnership with Snap Inc. for smart glasses.

feed.title: Qualcomm Boosts Quarterly Dividend to $0.92 From $0.89 a Share; Payable June 25 to Holders of Record on June 4
feed.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.92 per share, up from $0.89. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 25 to shareholders on record as of June 4, 2026. This news comes alongside other recent company updates, including a downgrade from BNP Paribas.

feed.title: Biogen CEO: China will match U.S. drug innovation in five to 10 years
feed.summary: Biogen CEO Chris Viehbacher stated that China is expected to match U.S. drug innovation within five to ten years. This comment comes as drugmakers are lobbying the White House and Congress for government assistance to boost their global competitiveness, leveraging the Trump administration's focus on on-shoring drug manufacturing. The article highlights the opening of Biogen's new West Coast hub and discusses the broader context of competition in the pharmaceutical industry.

feed.title: UnitedHealth (UNH) Selected as Top Pick by Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has named UnitedHealth Group Inc (UNH) as its Top Pick, setting a price target of $375 per share and maintaining an Overweight rating due to expected consistent positive results and improved Final Medicare Advantage rates. UnitedHealth, a diversified healthcare company with a $287.19 billion market capitalization, shows a GF Score™ of 67/100, indicating favorable long-term return potential, although its financial strength faces challenges with declining margins. Insider activity reflects mixed sentiment but an overall optimism for the company's future.

feed.title: UDR Maintained by Goldman Sachs -- Price Target Lowered to $35
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has maintained a 'Sell' rating on UDR, lowering its price target from $39.00 to $35.00, indicating a cautious outlook. Despite this, GuruFocus assesses UDR as approximately 17.9% undervalued with a GF Value™ of $41.71 against its current price of $34.25, and assigns a high GF Score™ of 81/100 driven by strong profitability and valuation. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to these mixed signals and a 3/10 financial strength rating.

feed.title: Teledyne (TDY) Advances Industrial Decarbonization with New Hydrogen Technology
feed.summary: Teledyne Energy Systems launched its Titan EL Series hydrogen generator at JTEKT Corporation in Japan, marking a significant step towards industrial decarbonization by enabling the production of high-purity green hydrogen on-site for aluminum melting processes. While Teledyne (TDY) demonstrates strong potential with a GF Score™ of 92/100 and high profitability and growth, the stock's P/E ratio suggests it may be overvalued, and recent insider selling raises questions about confidence despite its sustainability focus.

feed.title: Darien drivers get half-price EV charging as 12 new fast-charge ports open
feed.summary: Blink Charging has deployed a new high-power DC fast charging site at Brookhaven Market in Darien, IL, featuring six fast chargers with 12 ports. To celebrate Earth Day, Blink, Brookhaven Market, Heartland Charging Services, the City of Darien, and the Electrification Coalition are offering 50% off charging for two hours on April 22, 2026, and will host an EV charging showcase and ribbon-cutting ceremony. This initiative aims to expand EV infrastructure and support sustainable growth in the region.

feed.title: JPMorgan Cuts Church & Dwight Price Target to $98 From $100, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has reduced its price target for Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (CHD) to $98 from $100, while continuing to maintain a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a slightly more cautious outlook from the analyst firm. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for Church & Dwight, including RBC, Wells Fargo, UBS, Goldman Sachs, and TD Cowen.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. Raises Position in The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. increased its holdings in The TJX Companies by 2.7% in Q4, bringing its total to 574,995 shares valued at approximately $88.5 million. This makes TJX its 17th largest holding, representing about 1.0% of the firm's portfolio. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates with $1.43 EPS and $17.74 billion in revenue, and subsequently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.48 per share.

feed.title: Truist Finl Q1 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Truist Financial reported a Q1 2026 net income of $1.4 billion, a 25% increase year-over-year, driven by loan and fee growth, robust deposit engagement, and digital strategy enhancements including AI. The company targets a ROTCE of 14% in 2026 and 15% in 2027, with a long-term goal of 16-18%. Despite a slight revision to net interest income growth expectations due to unchanged federal rates, Truist maintains strong non-interest income growth forecasts and plans for increased share repurchases.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. Grows Position in Honeywell International Inc. $HON
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. increased its stake in Honeywell International Inc. by 2.3% in Q4, bringing its total holdings to 293,770 shares valued at approximately $60.21 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company, with hedge funds and institutions now owning about 75.91% of the stock. Analysts currently rate Honeywell as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $251.83.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT Shares Purchased by Welch Group LLC
feed.summary: Welch Group LLC increased its stake in Lockheed Martin (LMT) by 1.5% in Q4 2025, adding 1,999 shares to own a total of 132,684 shares valued at $64.18 million. This position represents 0.06% of LMT's outstanding shares and 2.5% of Welch Group LLC's total portfolio, making it their 18th largest holding. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $3.45 and analysts have a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $645.79.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. Has $16.06 Million Stake in Fortive Corporation $FTV
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. significantly reduced its stake in Fortive Corporation by 19.8% in Q4, leading them to hold 289,584 shares valued at $16.06 million. Despite this reduction, Fortive (NYSE: FTV) exceeded Q4 earnings expectations with $0.90 EPS on $1.12 billion in revenue and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance. The company maintains a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $60.17, while trading at $59.64 with a P/E of 34.47 and a 0.4% dividend yield.

feed.title: Fortive Corporation $FTV Stock Position Lowered by Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc.
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. reduced its stake in Fortive Corporation (NYSE: FTV) by 27.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 43,808 shares and holding 115,725 shares valued at $6.42 million. Despite this, other major institutional investors like Dodge & Cox and Viking Global increased their positions significantly. Fortive exceeded quarterly earnings estimates with an EPS of $0.90 and revenue of $1.12 billion, and provided full-year 2026 guidance of $2.90–$3.00 EPS.

feed.title: RTX Corporation $RTX Shares Sold by Welch Group LLC
feed.summary: Welch Group LLC reduced its stake in RTX Corporation by 3.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 17,308 shares and now holding over 500,000 shares valued at approximately $91.85 million. Despite this trimming, RTX remains its third-largest position. The article highlights positive operational catalysts for RTX, including certifications for Pratt & Whitney and contracts for Collins Aerospace and Raytheon, which are expected to boost revenue. However, notable insider selling by executives Neil G. Mitchill, Jr. and Kevin G. Dasilva, totaling over $18 million in the past 90 days, is also reported.

feed.title: Welch Group LLC Cuts Holdings in Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL
feed.summary: Welch Group LLC reduced its stake in Colgate-Palmolive by 10.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 72,609 shares and now holding 613,176 shares valued at approximately $48.45 million. Despite this, Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) outperformed quarterly estimates with an EPS of $0.95 and revenue of $5.23 billion, prompting analysts to project an EPS of $3.75 for the full year. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.53, resulting in an annualized dividend of $2.12 and a yield of 2.5%.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. Sells 11,310 Shares of Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. reduced its holdings in Merck & Co., Inc. by 4.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 11,310 shares and retaining 261,332 shares valued at approximately $28.45 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Merck, with an average target price of $128.47, and several have recently increased their price targets. Despite insider selling totaling $38.28 million by executives like the CEO and CMO, the company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates with $2.04 EPS and $16.40 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Amgen Inc. $AMGN Shares Sold by Whittier Trust Co.
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. significantly reduced its stake in Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) by 34.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 24,827 shares and retaining 47,811 shares valued at $15.79 million. Amgen exceeded Q4 estimates with EPS of $5.29 and revenue of $9.87 billion, showing an 8.6% year-over-year revenue increase. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $2.52 per share and has an average analyst rating of "Hold" with a target price of $356.24.

feed.title: Miller Value Deep Value Strategy Established a Position in Bloomin’ Brands (BLMN) Amid Multi-Year Transformation
feed.summary: Miller Value Deep Value Strategy initiated a position in Bloomin’ Brands (BLMN) in Q1 2026, viewing it as a company undergoing a multi-year transformation. The strategy believes Bloomin' Brands, despite recent share price declines, has significant upside potential due to its turnaround plan, leadership changes, reinvestment in assets, and low valuation compared to its normalized earnings potential. They highlight the company's efforts to improve the Outback banner, enhance the balance sheet, and invest in technology and restaurant remodels.

feed.title: Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited Files 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
feed.summary: Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited announced that it has filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report is accessible on both the company’s investor relations website and the SEC's website. Shareholders are entitled to receive hard copies of the report free of charge upon request.

feed.title: United Airlines Stock Is Down 20% From Its High. Is UAL a Buy Before Q1 2026 Earnings?
feed.summary: United Airlines stock (UAL) has fallen over 20% from its 52-week high due to surging jet fuel costs and global tariffs, despite reporting record 2025 revenues. The article explores whether UAL is undervalued, highlighting its strong MileagePlus loyalty program, dominant route networks, and improving balance sheet, and suggests watching RASM growth in the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report on April 21 to determine if the bear case driven by fuel costs can be offset. TIKR's model indicates a potential 59% total return by 2030, with analysts broadly bullish despite recent price target trims.

feed.title: Wright Investors Service Inc. Sells 8,557 Shares of Adobe Inc. $ADBE
feed.summary: Wright Investors Service Inc. reduced its stake in Adobe Inc. by 86.3%, selling 8,557 shares and retaining 1,362 shares valued at $477,000. Despite positive developments like the launch of the Firefly AI Assistant and strong Q1 earnings, analyst reactions are mixed, resulting in a "Hold" consensus rating and a target price of $343.88. The stock is currently trading around $248, with institutional ownership at 81.79% and some recent insider selling.

feed.title: ARS] HASBRO, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC Filing (Form ARS) by HASBRO, INC. (HAS) on April 17, 2026, categorized as having low impact and neutral sentiment. It provides details about the filing, links to the original document on SEC EDGAR, and includes a brief overview of Hasbro's stock performance and recent news and filings.

feed.title: AI talk dominates S&P 500 earnings calls in early 2026
feed.summary: Discussion of Artificial Intelligence (AI) significantly increased in S&P 500 earnings calls during early 2026, marking a substantial jump from the previous quarter. This indicates a growing focus on AI among major U.S. companies as they report their financial performance. The article highlights how AI is becoming a prominent topic in corporate financial communications.

feed.title: Salesforce, Inc. stock (US79466L3024): Is AI diffusion strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: This article examines Salesforce, Inc.'s position in the global markets, focusing on its CRM solutions and increasing integration of AI. It highlights Salesforce's subscription-based SaaS model, its AI pivot with Einstein AI, and its competitive standing against rivals like Microsoft Dynamics and Oracle. The piece evaluates the company's significance for U.S. and global investors, considering analyst views, potential risks, and its strategic outlook driven by AI and digital transformation.

feed.title: ATRA Shareholder Alert: May 22, 2026 Lead Plaintiff
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Atara Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ATRA), announcing a lead plaintiff deadline of May 22, 2026, for a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that during the period of May 20, 2024, to January 9, 2026, the company made false or misleading statements regarding manufacturing issues and the regulatory prospects of its drug tabelecleucel. Shareholders who purchased ATRA shares during this period are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Las Vegas police adopt Motorola AI system to speed case closures
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions has launched CommandCentral RMS, an AI-powered records and case management platform, which the Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department is implementing. This cloud-native solution integrates various forms of evidence and automates administrative tasks using mission-critical AI, Assist, to reduce officer paperwork and accelerate case closures. The system aims to streamline investigations from 911 calls to report generation and document redaction, ultimately enhancing public safety.

feed.title: IT Shareholder Alert: May 18, 2026 Lead Plaintiff Deadline
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for investors of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements regarding its growth rates and ability to meet consulting revenue targets, leading to significant stock price declines after negative earnings announcements. Shareholders have until May 18, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff appointment in the securities class action.

feed.title: GM Financial Announces 2025 Auction of the Year Winners
feed.summary: GM Financial announced its 2025 Auction of the Year winners, recognizing five regional auctions and one Most Valuable Auction for their high performance in remarketing. The company also awarded two auctions with the Perfect Audit Score. These awards, part of the annual Auction of Excellence program, highlight locations excelling in retention, operational metrics, and overall auction operations.

feed.title: L'Oréal Paris and Ulta Beauty Unveil "Mother & ___" Campaign: A Celebration of the Limitless Worth and Multifaceted Identities of Motherhood
feed.summary: L'Oréal Paris and Ulta Beauty have launched the "Mother & ___" campaign to celebrate the multifaceted identities of women beyond just the title of "Mom." This Mother's Day initiative, running from April 19th to May 11th across over 700 Ulta Beauty stores and digital platforms, encourages women to recognize and embrace all the various roles they embody. The campaign aims to spark a broader conversation about evolving identities and will feature in-store displays and a social media component where women can share their own "Mother & ___" stories.

feed.title: DuPont products for water reuse and worker safety earn Edison honors
feed.summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) announced it won two 2026 Edison Awards for its FilmTec™ Fortilife™ XC160UHP, recognized for industrial water reuse, and Tychem® 6000 SFR, honored for worker protection against chemical splash and flash-fire hazards. These awards highlight DuPont's commitment to innovation in sustainability and safety, addressing critical industry challenges with advanced solutions. The technologies aim to improve environmental performance and ensure worker safety across various sectors.

feed.title: AT&T Inc stock (US00206R1023): Is fiber expansion strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. is strategically focusing on fiber broadband expansion and wireless services after divesting non-core assets like WarnerMedia, aiming to capitalize on the surging demand for high-speed internet. The company's aggressive fiber rollout, targeting 30 million locations by 2025, is enhancing its competitive edge and driving revenue growth with lower churn and premium pricing. While debt levels remain a consideration, analysts view AT&T as a stable, income-focused investment, particularly attractive to those seeking dividend yield and exposure to essential telecom infrastructure in the U.S.
